ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist performing the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track has been played */,
  "listeners" INTEGER /* Total number of unique listeners for the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the music track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track (0-100) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit lyrics */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is a single */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist or band */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the artist */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play statistic record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being played */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time when the track was played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to play the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from where the track was played */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track was skipped by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_stats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_stats_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Subscription type (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the user's last login */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the user to sign up */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the genre's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
